meaning: n.即位,就任主教的仪式,登基典礼
examples: It is the first enthronement since 1928.
He was soon escorted by the monks to the temple where they held a significant enthronement ceremony in his honor.
The new archbishop's enthronement service will be held in Canterbury Cathedral on Thursday, with 2, 000 people invited to attend.
He has been commissioned to write an anthem for next month's enthronement of the next Archbishop of Canterbury, Justin Welby.
Tens of thousands of people are expected to attend his enthronement following his election on Thursday, the AFP news agency reports.
